plugin.name: Safe (Recommended)
plugin.description:
The narrow build. Hooks ONLY the CreateFileA/CreateFileW entries in SkyrimSE.exe's own import table, so file operations made by other SKSE plugins never reach this mod. Rewrites only existing, synchronous, read-only .bsa/.ba2 opens: removes FILE_FLAG_NO_BUFFERING so Windows can cache archive reads, and applies the archive-only random-access hint.
Saves, cosaves, journals, databases, logs, temp files, plugins, loose meshes/textures/audio and unknown extensions are never touched, and neither is any write, create, truncate, overlapped, write-through or delete-on-close handle.
No warm cache, no DirectStorage, no hardware probing, no process-wide tweaks. Use this for normal play and long-term saves.

plugin.name: Minimal (troubleshooting)
plugin.description: Safe, minus the random-access hint. Strips FILE_FLAG_NO_BUFFERING from archive reads and does nothing else at all. Use this when isolating a compatibility problem, or if you want the smallest possible behavioural change.

plugin.name: Experimental (unproven - benchmark it)
plugin.description:
Everything in Safe, plus three opt-in changes that are NOT proven to help:
- PROCESS-WIDE hook (Detours) instead of the executable's import table. File opens from other SKSE plugins pass through this mod's policy. The policy declines almost all of them, but this is a genuine compatibility surface. - Bounded warm cache: 512 MB total, 8 MB per archive, one low-priority thread, starting 60 seconds after load. It cannot know which archives your save needs, and background disk activity is a plausible microstutter cause. - Disables EcoQoS power throttling for the Skyrim process.
Benchmark this against Safe on your own system and save. If you cannot measure a difference, use Safe.

plugin.name: Do not bundle runtime (Recommended)
plugin.description: DirectStorage is not used by any shipped profile. Its raw-read path fills scratch memory and discards it, which does not populate the Windows cache Skyrim actually reads from. Leave this alone unless you are developing against it.

plugin.name: Install DirectStorage 1.3 runtime (advanced)
plugin.description: Adds roughly 1.7 MB of Microsoft redistributable DLLs beside the plugin. They stay dormant unless you manually set both bDirectStorageProbe and bDirectStorageWarmRead. No shipped profile enables them.
